visualization.description: Small multiple box plots showing distribution of CLTV, churn scores, and satisfaction scores across customer status groups, with color encoding customer age

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to selected status group(s)

visualization.description: Faceted heatmaps showing churn incidence rates across service attributes
Linked histograms with slider controls for metric ratio filtering

views.components: Dual range sliders for ratio thresholds

effect.description: Filters all subsequent views by selected ratio ranges

visualization.description: Parallel coordinates plot showing demographic-service patterns colored by churn risk
Bubble plot identifying customer advocates and churn risks
Connected scatter plots showing satisfaction trends over customer lifespan

outputs.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) to understand metric distributions across customer statuses. Selecting specific status groups filters Views 2-4. In View 3 (Exploration), ratio sliders create dynamic segments that propagate to Views 4-6. View 4's parallel coordinates reveal demographic patterns, while Views 5-6 (Insights) highlight extreme cases and trends. The pipeline enables progressive refinement from general patterns to specific actionable insights.
